Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.variable.impl.value.builder

Class FileValueBuilderImpl

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.variable.impl.value.builder.FileValueBuilderImpl

FileValueBuilder, TypedValueBuilder<FileValue>
public class FileValueBuilderImpl extends Object implements FileValueBuilder
